emotional_tone: Premium, cinematic, trustworthy, authoritative B2B credibility.

typography.font_pairings_reasoning: Cormorant Garamond provides a high-end, editorial, cinematic feel for large headlines, establishing trust and luxury. Outfit balances it with a clean, modern, and highly legible geometric sans-serif for body copy.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-12, p-16, py-24 for sections. Content must breathe to feel luxurious.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#B3912E] transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#25D366] text-white font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#1EBE5D] transition-colors flex items-center gap-2
buttons.outline: border border-white/20 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-sm

cards.service: bg-[#111111] border border-white/10 p-8 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-colors group

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 transition-all
navigation.links: text-sm font-medium text-white/70 hover:text-white uppercase tracking-wider transition-colors

hero_backgrounds.description: Black and silver DSLR camera on tripod - cinematic hero background
Professional film crew working on set in the dark - service page hero

corporate_office.description: Luxury corporate business meeting - about page or trust section

portfolio_thumbnails.description: Black and gray video camera - portfolio thumbnail
Drone flying over a city at sunset - portfolio thumbnail for drone shots
Man with camera rig - behind the scenes thumbnail

media.icons_strategy: lucide-react for UI icons. Use thin stroke widths (1.5) to maintain elegance.

specific_page_instructions.global: Every page must have exactly one H1. Floating WhatsApp button on bottom right of every page (z-50). Breadcrumb bar on inner pages.
specific_page_instructions.home: Cinematic hero with video-placeholder (use a dark image overlay). Trust bar with logos + stat chips below hero. 8 Service cards grid. Featured work with play buttons. Testimonial slider/grid. FAQs.
specific_page_instructions.service_template: Hero with specific service title. What's Included grid. 5-step process timeline. Pricing teaser strip. Related services at bottom.
specific_page_instructions.portfolio: Masonry grid layout with filter tabs (e.g., Corporate, Commercials, Drone, Events).
specific_page_instructions.location: Include a map placeholder and a reviews strip specifically targeting Gurgaon / Delhi NCR clients.
specific_page_instructions.contact: Form with service dropdown. Clear display of address: Plot No. 70, Avenue 77, Sector 77, Gurugram, Haryana 122004.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

elementor_conversion_guidance: Keep layouts strictly section-based (Container/Row/Column). Avoid complex scroll-jacking or heavy framer-motion animations that are hard to replicate in WordPress. Use simple fade-ins or slide-ups. Stick to flex and grid utilities.
